title: Delivery Target Receipt Specification
description: Schema for a delivery target receipt.

target_id.description: The ID of the delivery target.

package_digest.description: The SHA-256 digest of the package delivered.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of when the delivery was received.

status.description: The status of the delivery receipt (e.g., success, failed).

metadata.description: Key-value pairs of any extra delivery context.
